testcase.name: runScenario["Verify valid login credentials", "05_04_2026 - LoginFeatures"](1)
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Log in] but found [] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:656) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:666) at stepDefinitions.LoginStepDefinitin.the_login_card_title_should_be_verified(LoginStepDefinitin.java:43) at ✽.the Login card title should be verified(file:///C:/Users/Muhindhar%20S%20V/eclipse-workspace/Cucumber/src/test/resources/com/features/Login.feature:9)
